backend/main.mo: Defines data types and query methods for content sections, quiz questions, quiz scoring, and printable guides with in-memory maps.
feature_evidence.json: Structured feature evidence report listing added or modified frontend components, dependencies, and test references.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Provides brief descriptions of various frontend files and components for documentation or planning.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global style definitions with light/dark OKLCH color variables and base styling.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML shell that loads the React app entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component initializing React Query and rendering header, content, and footer.
frontend/src/components/EducationalConte: Main educational UI with tab navigation and pest selector that renders content, quizzes, guides, and scanner based on state.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer displaying attribution, copyright, and disclaimer text.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header with app branding, icon, and subtitle.
frontend/src/components/pests/ArmyAntsCo: Static informational content describing army ant identification, behavior, habitat, and safety considerations.
frontend/src/components/pests/BeetlesCon: Provides beetle identification info, common indoor species, and signs of infestation, plus entry points and attractants.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackAntsC: Describes how to identify black ants, common species, signs of their presence, and nesting habitats and attractants.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackStink: Covers physical traits, species, and signs of black stink bugs along with why and how they enter homes.
frontend/src/components/pests/CarpenterA: Explains carpenter ant identification, species, and key infestation signs, with safety warnings about structural damage.
frontend/src/components/pests/Cockroache: Outlines cockroach identification, major species, infestation indicators, and typical hiding spots and attractants.
frontend/src/components/pests/EarwigsCon: Displays educational content about identifying earwigs, their signs, habitats, and behaviors using alerts and cards.
frontend/src/components/pests/HeadLiceCo: Provides information on head lice, including identification, symptoms, and how they spread through structured UI sections.
frontend/src/components/pests/MiceConten: Shows details on recognizing mice, signs of infestation, nesting materials, and common indoor habitats.
frontend/src/components/pests/MothsLarva: Explains how to identify moths and larvae, signs of damage, and where infestations commonly occur.
frontend/src/components/pests/RedAntsCon: Presents safety warnings and identification details for red ants along with their species types, signs, and habitats.
frontend/src/components/pests/ScorpionsC: Displays educational content about identifying scorpions, their habitats, behaviors, and safety warnings using cards and alerts.
frontend/src/components/pests/SpidersCon: Provides guidance on identifying spiders, signs of their presence, and details about venomous species with safety alerts.
frontend/src/components/pests/WoodBeetle: Explains types of wood-boring beetles, signs of infestation, and damage characteristics with safety notices.
frontend/src/components/PhotoScanner.tsx: Provides a full photo scanning workflow including camera capture, file upload, editing (crop, rotate, enhance), saving scans, and downloading processed images.
Fetches and displays downloadable PDF guides for a quiz section, handling loading states and file download links.
frontend/src/components/Quiz.tsx: Implements an interactive quiz with question navigation, answer selection, scoring, and final results calculation for a given section.
frontend/src/components/SavedScansGaller: Displays saved scans with tag filtering, deletion confirmation, reordering, and tag management tools.
frontend/src/components/SavedScanTagsEdi: Allows adding, editing, and removing tags on a saved scan with inline editing support.
frontend/src/components/sections/Habitat: Outlines common bed bug hiding spots, feeding behavior, and lifecycle information with supporting images.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeatTre: Implements a safety reminder dialog for heat treatment, focusing on precautions and requiring user confirmation.
frontend/src/components/sections/Identif: Shows identification details for bed bugs including adult traits, life stages, and bite signs with images.
frontend/src/components/sections/Prevent: Displays prevention tips for avoiding bed bugs with alerts, images, and instructional text cards.
frontend/src/components/sections/Treatme: Implements a heat‑treatment checklist UI with phases, progress tracking, and reminder gating.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and invalidates queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeatTreatmentCheck: Tracks checklist item completion in localStorage and provides toggling, reset, and progress stats.
Handles showing and confirming a reminder dialog using localStorage to persist confirmation state.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageEditor.ts: Provides image editing state and processing for rotation, zoom, enhancement, and export.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity auth client lifecycle, login state, and provides identity via context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching quizzes and guides and submitting quiz results using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedScans.ts: React hook managing saved scans with localStorage, supporting create, delete, reorder, and tag operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles and custom color variables for light/dark themes, plus utility for completed checklist items.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point initializing React, react-query, Internet Identity provider, and global styles.
frontend/src/utils/imageProcessing.ts: Image utilities providing rotate, enhance, zoom, and crop functions using canvas processing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme extensions, color tokens, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing features, requirements, state version, and image needs for the pest education app.
